title: Bhagwant Mann Takes Brutal-Savage 'Ginger, Garlic, Red Chilli' Jibe At Rebel Raghav Chadha And Team: Here's What He Meant
description: Punjab CM Bhagwant Mann compared the seven AAP MPs who defected to the BJP, including Raghav Chadha, to spices that enhance a dish but said they cannot become the 'vegetable', asserting that no individual is bigger than the party.
